ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "useful" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review useful */,
  "funny" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review funny */,
  "cool" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review cool */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the review was submitted */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numeric score indicating the sentiment of the review */,
  "reply_id" TEXT /* ID of the reply from the business (if any) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who submitted the review */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to submit the review */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review has been flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Text field for the reason why the review was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_business_owner" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a business owner */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is an administrator */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the business (e.g., restaurant, retail) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the business location */,
  "owner_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who owns the business */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the business's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Text field describing the business's operating hours */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text field for a brief description of the business */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the business is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* ID of the review associated with the rating */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business associated with the analytics */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the business */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the business */,
  "review_trend" TEXT /* JSON field storing trends in the number of reviews over time */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* JSON field storing trends in sentiment scores over time */,
  "most_used_words" TEXT /* JSON field storing the most frequently used words in reviews */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* ID of the review the reply is for */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the reply (likely a business owner) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
